title: Beresford Place (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
The man who has and does not give
        Shall break his neck, and cease to live;
        But he who gives without a care
        Shall gather rubies from the air.
meaning:
James Stephens's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Beresford Place (The Rocky Road To Dublin)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
